author: pedrogdn
description: Quickly add timestamp bullet points to your notes

manifest.author: pedrogdn
manifest.description: Quickly add timestamp bullet points to your notes
manifest.name: Time Bullet

name: Time Bullet

releases.author: pedrogdn
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fix moved-window key handling and add regression tests by @pedrogdn in https://github.com/pedrogdn/obsidian-time-bullet-plugin/pull/7
* Add toggle time bullet command with tests by @pedrogdn in https://github.com/pedrogdn/obsidian-time-bullet-plugin/pull/8

## New Contributors
* @pedrogdn made their first contribution in https://github.com/pedrogdn/obsidian-time-bullet-plugin/pull/7

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pedrogdn/obsidian-time-bullet-plugin/compare/1.1.0...1.2.0

releases.author: pedrogdn
releases.description:
This release introduces two new features: custom time formats and a UTC time option.

Download the following compressed file for manual installation.

[time-bullet-plugin.zip](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/21702842/time-bullet-plugin.zip)

Includes:

main.js
manifest.json

releases.author: pedrogdn
releases.description:
First official release of Time Bullet Plugin for Obsidian!

Download the following compressed file for manual installation.

[Download](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/19081322/time-bullet-plugin.zip)

Includes: 

- main.js
- manifest.json
